commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul wants everyone who serves God’s righteousness to be peaceful….The person who is not peaceful is the one who has rejected the law of God and who follows his own law instead…. Even if the other person is not a lover of peace, you should want to be peaceful insofar as you can be. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Gennadius of Constantinople
commentaries.content: Paul says that he wants Christians to have the right spirit, even if others think differently. .

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: If it be possible. Have peace with all. That is, if it can be without prejudice to truth or justice And even when others wrong you, seek not to revenge yourselves, but leave your cause to God. Do good offices even to those that do evil to you. (Witham)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
